From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 25 Mar 2025 13:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-03-25
Message-ID: <cBGhr8Y_QAyW_i6ghFsnbw@geopod-ismtpd-38>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="55b2826bdb0c082656256baef5fcd51453dc1be28a0109e3a78f60c3207b"

Hi there, Llama Friends! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter! We
have some exciting updates and resources to share, including a
new course on building agents, a step-by-step tutorial on
corrective RAG, and the launch of LlamaExtract in public beta.
Dive in to discover how you can enhance your projects with these
innovative tools and insights!

🤩 The Highlights:

* LlamaExtract Public Beta: LlamaExtract is now in public beta!
It allows you to define a schema and automatically extract
structured data from your documents. Read the full demo post here
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..sX_ok-_ycEgz6WZsEm0lFL_3b8P8g0tz0n5wIDfuh2Y ) and sign up today 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..vnPoBs9skMEklso_qy-UzydoN2MXkEuY8f7Aqspa93E ).
* Step-by-Step Tutorial on Corrective RAG: Check out this
fantastic tutorial by @akshay_pachaar 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..v6uCj9Zn1UYIviJyr826OEzRoutEP5lASNIMp17C8IM ) on building an agentic
reasoning system for search and retrieval (specifically,
corrective RAG) from scratch using LlamaIndex workflows 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rPLm6Gn801QSUnr8zUVPli71IS4fJVth_9yE7kRLLOY ).
* Free Courses on Building Agents: In case you missed it, we
launched some high-profile free courses on building agentic
systems with LlamaIndex, one with DeepLearning.AI 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..13Ltmd7HCiDQ6AiE5hhWpp2QRnkY5orhgQZxpY0o22U )
 and another with HuggingFace 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..6iTvuXoAEdbxCPTiI6DymLtsaSqM4caRWc97aUEpVuM )
! Don't miss them.

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* AI Voice Assistant Pipeline: Build an AI voice assistant
pipeline with ROCm, LlamaIndex, and RAG on @AMD GPUs. This
tutorial covers transcription, context-aware responses, and
text-to-speech. Get started here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.._Fmjd3NYC3np6Wg04Itg2ioChK3N6Pd1JHI1aDgst0g ).
* Large-Scale Structured Extraction with LlamaExtract: Learn how
to extract 50-100 fields from complex documents using
LlamaExtract. This guide covers defining schemas, using optional
fields, and verifying accuracy. Explore the notebook here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..C8dja29S9jhv3oy79F_-ykQuNCEmtdc0trA-WG8LFQM ) and sign up for LlamaExtract 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..diSWaBuebugWYSiFFdnjffhbXhEZfpFwKAKrzF8nLEg ).

✨ Framework:

* Gen AI Toolbox for Databases: We've teamed up with @googlecloud
to simplify building AI agents using the Gen AI Toolbox for
Databases. Learn more about this integration 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BbMQhgrh5x_JNx2h03dtB1obY5Wcz5k-55ceU_u7fBE ) and check out the quickstart 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YA9jUFd-Mfa2zVbtCw7qluTgkt_dK6wFm9y_OxB7494 ).
* Unified Google AI Integration: Now there's a unified
integration that supports both Google Gemini and Google Vertex
AI, handling everything from streaming to structured
prediction. Explore the new integration here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bFkpAEUAr6WiJ4smZMY_YVZBbwTbQjyBoK3-MwjOiGQ ).

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GdyLe0XpcoSR9CNh9z-_jzPBKTi_ax4qoml7kQsliMs )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..V9DjEA6yZZp3ltUb4EEghnZhyT8CWEdoKJB702Hwk60 )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..u5t-Bh3QBn_beSo5UMe5rXNWFm1CvEuUUMsutqnGLcs )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
